tagline: A new site that turned visitors into qualified leads - in 8 weeks.
description: Apex Consulting's old website looked like it was built in 2014 because it was. We redesigned and rebuilt their entire web presence in 8 weeks - and within 30 days of launch, inbound lead volume had increased by 220%.
challenge: Apex's site had a 78% bounce rate, loaded in 6.4 seconds on mobile, and buried their service offering behind dense copy that nobody was reading. Leads who did get in touch were often unqualified - the site wasn't attracting the right-profile clients. The team had tried a website refresh with a freelancer 18 months prior but the project stalled and was never completed.
solution: We kicked off with a two-day discovery sprint: customer interviews, heatmap review of the old site, and a competitor landscape audit. The new architecture was designed around a core conversion path - surface the right service, establish credibility, remove friction to contact. We built in Next.js for performance, implementing static generation and image optimisation that brought the Lighthouse score from 41 to 97. Conversion-rate-optimised landing pages were built for each service line, with dedicated forms that pre-qualified leads before they hit the inbox. The site launched on time in week 8 with full CMS integration so the team can update content without developer involvement.

testimonial.quote: We briefed three agencies. growX were the only ones who pushed back on our assumptions and came back with a strategy, not just a quote. The site speaks for itself.
testimonial.author: Marcus Webb
testimonial.title: Managing Partner, Apex Consulting
